allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Initial commit: Audio Stream Generator with Mistral AI integration

- Audio streaming application with real-time effects
- Mistral AI integration for dynamic parameter generation
- Tkinter UI with volume, pitch, and octave sliders
- Waveform visualization using matplotlib
- Random and manual build-up/climax triggers
- Support for WAV file playback with real-time processing

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Add hybrid mode: Support both WAV file playback and synthesis

Features added:
- WAV file selection with "Select WAV File" button
- Ability to use custom audio files (user''s preferred voice)
- Clear button to switch between file mode and synthesis mode
- Word frequency slider (0-100%) to control TTS word occurrence
- Dual-mode audio engine supporting both playback and generation

File Mode enhancements:
- Loads and loops user''s WAV files seamlessly
- Applies state-based pitch shifting during climax/building
- Adds intensity modulation based on current state
- Enhances with breathiness during intense states
- Layers TTS words on top of the base audio

UI improvements:
- Audio Source section with file selection and clear controls
- Word frequency slider with visual percentage display
- Status messages for file loading and mode switching
- Waveform shows loaded file when not playing

Technical changes:
- audio_engine.py: load_audio_file(), unload_audio_file() methods
- audio_engine.py: _generate_from_file() for WAV playback with effects
- audio_engine.py: _generate_from_synthesis() for formant synthesis
- audio_engine.py: Smart word scheduling based on frequency slider
- ui.py: File selection UI, clear button, word frequency control
- requirements.txt: Re-added librosa for pitch shifting

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
